features: BURSTING WITH FRAGRANCE: A fragrant bloom of sweet freesia, combining top notes of bergamot, with a heart of jasmine

ELEVATE YOUR BATHROOM EXPERIENCE: With Zoflora Fragrance Burst toilet rim blocks, experience an intensely fragranced toilet freshener that releases essential oils with every flush, transforming your toilet into a haven of beautiful, long-lasting fragrance

LASTS UP TO 200 FLUSHES: Fragrance Burst will provide long-lasting fragrance for up to 200 flushes, ensuring a fresh and pleasant scent with every use, and offering a convenient and effective way to keep your toilet smelling clean

POWERED BY ESSENTIAL OILS: Infuse your bathroom with an indulgent fragrance experience, helping to maintain a clean and fresh toilet bowl and rim for an extended period, ensuring a hygienic and pleasant environment in your bathroom

ACTIVE POWER FOAM: Active Power Foam effectively prevents dirt from sticking to the toilet bowl, while the limescale preventers and effective cleaning agents work together to maintain a fresh, clean, and hygienic environment in your bathroom

DIRECTIONS: Break the plastic lock and hang the rim block over the inside of the toilet, ensuring it is placed in the flow of water; place the flexible cage where the water flow is strongest under the rim; remove when empty

ALSO AVAILABLE IN: Discover a range of perfumer-developed fragrances, including our fragrance burst scents such as Midnight Blooms, Sweet Pea & Blue Lotus, and Water Lily, as well as our Limitless scents like Grapefruit & Lime and Sweet Freesia, providing a diverse selection of scents to suit your preference

EXPLORE THE ZOFLORA RANGE: Discover a diverse selection of captivating fragrances and specialized formulations within the Zoflora range, offering an array of choices to suit your cleaning needs; from bathroom cleaners that provide effective and hygienic cleaning to floor wipes that maintain cleanliness and freshness, and multi-purpose sprays that offer versatile cleaning solutions
description: Product Description Rim blocks: Zoflora Toilet Rim Blocks are an effective solution to keep your toilet fresh, clean, and sanitized while eliminating odors and killing 99.9% of bacteria and viruses*. Proudly made in Yorkshire since 1922, Zoflora offers a diverse selection of beautifully crafted fragrances, including fragrance burst options such as Midnight Blooms, Sweet Pea, and Blue Lotus & Water Lily, as well as Limitless scents like Grapefruit & Lime and Sweet Freesia, giving you a wide range of choices to suit your preferences. Designed to fight odors and deliver a refreshing fragrance with every flush, Zoflora Toilet Rim Blocks provide up to 200 flushes of all-day freshness. These rim blocks are easy to use,simply break the plastic lock and hang the rim block over the inside of the toilet, ensuring it is placed where the water flow is strongest under the rim. When empty, remove the block and replace as needed. Zoflora Toilet Rim Blocks not only leave your toilet smelling fresh, but they also effectively kill bacteria and viruses, including those that cause toilet Odors. Infused with essential oils, these rim blocks deliver an indulgent fragrance experience, helping to maintain a fresh and hygienic toilet bowl for an extended period. Additionally, they are equipped with Active Power Foam, which helps prevent dirt from sticking to the toilet bowl, while limescale preventers and effective cleaning agents work together to ensure a hygienic environment in your bathroom. For a complete cleaning solution, explore the wider Zoflora range, which includes bathroom cleaners, floor wipes, and multi-purpose sprays. With Zoflora, you can maintain a clean, fresh, and fragrant bathroom with ease. Whether you need specialized bathroom cleaning products or versatile solutions for various surfaces, Zoflora has the products you need to keep your home fresh and hygienic. Ingredients Ingredients: >30 % anionic surfactants, perfumes; preservatives: Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate; allergenic fragrances: Limonene, Linalool, Geraniol, Citral, Citronellol. Manufacturer Contact Information Thornton & Ross Limited, Huddersfield, HD7 5QH, UK. See more
